headline: Why Fifth Third Bancorp Is Still Priced Like a Cyclical Bank
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is priced for balance?sheet risk that its earnings profile and capital discipline no longer justify.

headline: Fifth Third Bancorp’s Comerica Deal Reshapes Growth And Valuation Story
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp completed its $10.9b acquisition of Comerica, expanding into markets such as California and Texas. Senior Comerica executives have been appointed as new regional presidents within Fifth Third. The bank is planning an entry into Texas with 50 to 60 new branches in Houston. Fifth Third Bancorp (NasdaqGS: FITB) is reshaping its footprint with the completed Comerica deal and a wider reach into key markets. The stock last closed at $43.4, with a 1 year return of 16.7% and a 3...
